name: Get-Alias

options.name: -Definition
options.description: Gets the aliases for the specified item. Enter the name of a cmdlet, function, script, file, or executable file.

options.name: -Exclude
options.description: Omits the specified items. The value of this parameter qualifies the Name and Definition parameters. Enter a name, a definition, or a pattern, such as "s*". Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the aliases that this cmdlet gets. Wildcards are permitted. By default, `Get-Alias` retrieves all aliases defined for the current session. The parameter name Name is optional. You can also pipe alias names to `Get-Alias`.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the scope for which this cmdlet gets aliases. The acceptable values for this parameter are:

description: Gets the aliases for the current session.
